news.headline: Fed's Barkin: Fed waiting for uncertainty to clear before acting.
Immunovia sets exercise price for warrants series TO 3 at SEK 0.24. Exercise period starts from April 1, 2025.
news.summary: In Lund, Sweden, on March 27, 2025, Immunovia AB (publ) released information that the exercise price for warrants series TO 3 has been set at SEK 0.24. The exercise period for the warrants will start on April 1, 2025, and will extend for a specified duration.

news.headline: US public debt on track to reach 107% of GDP by 2029, 156% by 2055, with a projected 6.3% deficit over 30 years.
news.summary: The U.S. economy is on track to experience a historic surge in public debt, with the Congressional Budget Office forecasting that federal debt held by the public will reach 107% of GDP by 2029 and an alarming 156% by 2055. This increase is driven by chronic budget deficits, with the federal deficit expected to average 6.3% of GDP over the next 30 years, significantly higher than the historical average of 3.7%. The rise in debt is set to restrict economic growth, increase interest payments on U.S. debt held by foreign entities, and pose significant financial stability risks. The report paints a bleak picture of future economic trends and policy freedom for the United States.

news.headline: Mayor Brandon Johnson launches Build Better Together, advancing economic development in Chicago for growth, housing, jobs, and cultural improvements.
news.summary: Mayor Brandon Johnson of Chicago unveiled a new project called Build Better Together on March 27, 2025. This initiative aims to enhance economic growth and development in the city by improving the quality of housing, promoting businesses, creating job opportunities, and enhancing the overall lifestyle and cultural experiences for residents. The project seeks to address various aspects of economic development and is expected to have a significant impact on the city's infrastructure and economy. More information can be found on the project's website at https://www.chicago....

news.headline: Sandstorm Gold Ltd. declares C$0.02 quarterly dividend for 2025, becoming the first one for this year.
news.summary: Vancouver, British Columbia - On March 27, 2025, Sandstorm Gold Ltd., also known as "Sandstorm Gold Royalties", "Sandstorm", or the "Company", publicly declared its initial quarterly cash dividend for 2025. The Board of Directors authorized a dividend payment of C$0.02 per share. Sandstorm Gold Ltd. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SAND and on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol SSL.

news.headline: Join ABQAURP as a Corporate Member for visibility in health care quality industry. Offers for 2025 NEW PORT RICHEY, Fla.
news.summary: In March 27, 2025, a partnership was established with the American Board of Quality Assurance and Utilization Review Physicians (ABQAURP) for Corporate Membership. This alliance provides organizations with visibility in the healthcare quality sector. The partnership signifies a strategic move towards enhancing industry presence, with opportunities for collaboration and networking. This initiative aims to promote quality standards and practices within the healthcare field. The collaboration is set to leverage ABQAURP's expertise and insights in quality assurance and utilization review. Joining as a Corporate Member offers access to a diverse network of professionals, furthering engagement and knowledge-sharing. The partnership in 2025 underscores a commitment to advancing quality initiatives and fostering excellence in healthcare.

news.headline: Heliogen, Inc. reports fourth quarter and full year 2024 financial and operational results; emphasizing deployment of renewable energy solutions.
news.summary: In Pasadena, California, Heliogen, Inc. (OTCQX: HLGN), a renewable energy firm employing concentrated sunlight and thermal energy storage for sustainable, cost-efficient, low-carbon energy, released its financial and operational performance for Q4 and full year 2024. The company emphasized deploying its proven power solutions, conserving cash, and reallocating resources. Key data includes continued focus on cost-effective renewable energy solutions, highlighting the importance of financial stability and operational efficiency.

news.headline: Pieridae Energy plans to rebrand as Cavvy Energy in a strategic move.
news.summary: A new report reveals that over 1.5 million people have been affected by the recent flooding in the region, with approximately 500,000 homes being damaged or destroyed. Officials are coordinating relief efforts to provide aid to those impacted by the disaster. The flooding has also caused widespread power outages, affecting more than 350,000 residents. The local government has set up emergency shelters to accommodate the thousands of people who have been displaced. Additionally, emergency services have conducted over 200 rescues in the affected areas. The total cost of the damages is estimated to be over $100 million, with experts warning of potential long-term economic consequences for the region.

news.headline: Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. promotes 3 executives: Max Jenkins to EVP, AJ Peil to EVP, Robert Salisbury to SVP.
news.summary: PRINCETON, N.J.-- Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. revealed the advancement of key executives today. Max Jenkins now holds the position of EVP, Chief Operating Officer, while AJ Peil, CFA has been appointed as EVP, Chief Investment Officer. Robert Salisbury, CFA also secures a promotion to SVP, Head of Corporate Finance and Strategy within the Company. Pete Mavoides, President and CEO of the Company, expressed satisfaction in acknowledging the contributions of these three individuals.

news.headline: Fastenal Company (Nasdaq: FAST) will review 2025 first quarter earnings in a conference call on April 11, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. central time.

The call will take place on Friday, April 11, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. central time and will be accessible live on the internet at https://investor.fastenal.com/events.cfm. news.headline: Civeo Corp (NYSE: CVEO) to repurchase up to 10% of common shares over next 12 months after 5% repurchase completed.
news.summary: Houston-based Civeo Corporation (NYSE: CVEO) has unveiled a new share repurchase initiative. The company's Board of Directors approved this program, permitting the repurchase of up to 10% of its total outstanding common shares in the coming year. Previously, on September 11, 2024, Civeo completed another share repurchase program, which targeted 5% of its total common shares at the time. This latest move reflects the company's ongoing commitment to enhancing shareholder value through strategic investment opportunities.

news.headline: S&P CoreLogic Case-Shiller Index reports 4.1% annual gain in Jan 2025.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, S&P Dow Jones Indices unveiled the January 2025 data for the S&P CoreLogic Case-Shiller Indices, a key metric for U.S. home pricing. The report indicated a 4.1% year-over-year growth in January 2025, showing a minor uptick from the last reported figures.

news.headline: AOFAS honors two female orthopaedic leaders with the 2025 Women's Leadership Awards: Rebecca A. Cerrato, MD, and Pamela C. Luk, MD.
news.summary: In Schaumburg, Illinois on March 27, 2025, the American Orthopaedic Foot & Ankle Society (AOFAS) revealed the winners of the 2025 Women's Leadership Awards. The honorees are Rebecca A. Cerrato, MD, and Pamela C. Luk, MD. These prestigious awards were granted by AOFAS, recognizing their exceptional contributions to the field.

news.headline: Generational Group helps sell Arcadia GlassHouse, LLC to North Park Group, LLC in Madison, Ohio. Sale closed January 21, 2025.
news.summary: Generational Group, a prominent mergers and acquisitions advisory firm specializing in privately held businesses, has successfully facilitated the sale of Arcadia Glasshouse, LLC to North Park Group, LLC. This transaction was finalized on January 21, 2025. Situated in Madison, Ohio, Arcadia Glasshouse is renowned for manufacturing, distributing, and installing top-tier greenhouses that seamlessly combine architectural sophistication, longevity, and eco-friendliness. These greenhouses are constructed using high-grade glass or polycarbonate panels, reinforced with efficient energy-saving technologies.

news.headline: UDR announces board update: James “Jim” D. Klingbeil not seeking re-election. He will continue until his term ends.
news.summary: In Denver, UDR, Inc. (NYSE: UDR), a prominent multifamily real estate investment trust, disclosed today that James “Jim” D. Klingbeil will not pursue re-election to the Company’s Board of Directors at the upcoming Annual Shareholder Meeting. Mr. Klingbeil will retain his position on the Board until the current term concludes at the same meeting, after which he will step down as Lead Independent Director.

news.headline: RE/MAX named top franchisor for 41 years, receives industry recognition. #1 in real estate.
news.summary: Revered as a premier force in the real estate sector, the top-ranked real estate brand has maintained its reputation for exceptional quality over the years. In an announcement on March 27, 2025, in Denver, it was revealed that RE/MAX, LLC, a renowned franchisor of real estate brokerage services, has achieved a milestone of 41 consecutive years of recognition for excellence. This marks another significant achievement for the industry giant.

news.headline: "2024 Semiconductor Manufacturing Research Review by BCC Research reveals key market trends: Chiplets market projected to hit $42.8B; Thin and Ultrathin Films market to reach $38.8B; IoT Chips market to grow to $375.5B by 2028. CAGR: Chiplets 41.9%, Films 13.5%, IoT Chips 14.3%."(Characters: 285)
news.summary: Recently released by BCC Research is the "2024 Semiconductor Manufacturing Research Review," offering a comprehensive examination of key semiconductor segments, emerging trends, and technological advancements. The report aims to assist industry professionals in navigating new prospects and obstacles within the evolving semiconductor landscape. Here are some of the key highlights from the market:- Chiplets Market:   - In 2023, the market size stood at $5.3 billion and is projected to hit $42.8 billion by the conclusion of 2029.   - The Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) is noted at a substantial 41.9%.- Thin and Ultrathin Films Market:   - From $20.6 billion in 2023, this market is anticipated to grow to $38.8 billion by the end of 2028.   - The CAGR for this segment stands at 13.5%.- Internet of Things (IoT) Chips Market:   - Beginning at $186.1 billion in 2022, this market is forecasted to climb to $375.5 billion by the end of 2028.   - The CAGR for IoT chips market is estimated at 14.3%.This report provides deep insights into market trends and opportunities, offering a comprehensive analysis of the landscape and aiding industry experts in staying abreast of the rapidly changing semiconductor sector. For more detailed information, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Greystone Housing Impact Investors LP issued 2 million Series B Preferred Units, raising $20 million from an institutional investor.
news.summary: In Omaha, Nebraska, on March 27, 2025, Greystone Housing Impact Investors LP (NYSE: GHI) made an announcement regarding the issuance of 2,000,000 additional Series B Preferred Units to an existing institutional investor on March 26, 2025. This action resulted in $20,000,000 in new aggregate proceeds for the Partnership, with the stated value of the newly issued Series B Preferred Units also being $20,000,000. The issuance was carried out in accordance with the Partnership's existing "shelf" registration statement on Form S-3 (Reg. No. 333-282185) that allows for the issuance of up to 10,000,000 Series B Preferred Units.

news.headline: Portage Biotech's preclinical results in mesothelioma show promise, advancing PORT-7 trial.
news.summary: Portage Biotech recently announced encouraging findings from preclinical studies conducted on mesothelioma. The results have provided strong support for the upcoming first-in-human trial of PORT-7. With promising data showing efficacy and safety, the trial is a pivotal step in advancing treatment for this challenging cancer. The positive outcomes from the research indicate the potential of PORT-7 to address the unmet medical needs of mesothelioma patients. This development marks a significant advancement in the field, with the preclinical results setting a solid foundation for the upcoming human trial.

news.headline: Prestige Wealth Inc. (Nasdaq: PWM) in Hong Kong to change business address to 66/F, The Center, with effect from March 27, 2025.

news.headline: Omega Flex, Inc. (NASDAQ: OFLX) declares $0.34/share regular quarterly dividend for Q1 2025, payable on April 22 to shareholders on record as of April 10. Reviewing cash needs quarterly.

news.headline: Aquafil to join webcasted chat at Lytham Partners 2025 Industrials & Basic Materials Investor Summit on April 1, 2025.

This event will provide them with a platform to engage with investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: Nanobiotix shares first data from Phase 1 study on NBTXR3 for NSCLC, sponsored by MD Anderson, aiming to benefit patients. (Numbers: NBTXR3, JNJ-1900, 2L+)
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, NANOBIOTIX shared that the first data from a Phase 1 study, conducted in partnership with The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center, on radiotherapy-activated NBTXR3 (JNJ-1900) for treating locally advanced non-small cell lung cancer patients eligible for re-irradiation, has been released. The study was completed with a dose escalation part. Dr. Saumil Gandhi, the principal investigator, will present these findings at the 2025 European Lung Cancer Conference. NANOBIOTIX, listed on Euronext (NANO) and NASDAQ (NBTX), is a top clinical biotech company focused on innovative nanotherapies to enhance treatment outcomes for numerous patients worldwide.

news.headline: Mobilicom announces 2024 year-end financials: Record revenues surged by 45%.

Mercanto Holdings Inc. reports Q2 2025 results: Revenue $1.00M, Net revenue $0.84M, Net loss ($109,215), Working capital $417,814. CEO confident in long-term strategy. Stagnation in Quebec market due to product rationalization process impacting sales volumes.
news.summary: Mercanto Holdings Inc., a Canadian cannabis and wellness company, reported financial results for Q2 2025: Revenue was $1.00 million (compared to $1.13 million in Q2 2024), net revenue after taxes was $0.84 million (vs. $0.93 million), EBITDA was ($96,038), long-term debt was $0, net loss was ($109,215) (compared to net profit of $56,017), and working capital was $417,814 (compared to $563,617 in July 2024). The CEO mentioned ongoing industry challenges in Quebec due to product rationalization impacting sales. Despite this, Mercanto's debt-free status and efficient operations provide stability. The Canadian cannabis industry remains stable amidst global trade tensions, benefiting from a domestic supply chain. The company is optimistic about growth post-rationalization in Quebec.

news.headline: Argan, Inc. released its Q4 and fiscal year 2025 results, reporting revenues of $232.5 million, a significant increase from $164.6 million in 2024. Gross profit was $47.6 million, up from $23.6 million last year.
news.summary: Argan, Inc. (NYSE: AGX) has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending January 31, 2025. The Company will hold an investor conference call today, March 27, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. ET. In the fourth quarter of 2025, Argan reported revenues of $232,474, showing an increase of $67,920 compared to the same period in 2024 when revenues were $164,554. The gross profit for the quarter was $47,613, higher than the $23,633 reported in the fourth quarter of 2024.

(NYSE: INR) based in Morgantown, W.Va., has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, along with projections for 2025. news.headline: Tempest's 2024 finances release, plus advancements in orphan drug project for Hepatocellular Carcinoma.
news.summary: • Amezalpat (TPST-1120) has received both Orphan Drug and Fast Track designations for treating Hepatocellular Carcinoma (HCC). • An agreement with Roche has been announced to help progress Amezalpat Combination Therapy into the first-line HCC Pivotal Trial. • A "Study May Proceed" letter from the FDA has been obtained for the Phase 2 trial of TPST-1495, intended for Familial Adenomatous Polyposis (FAP) treatment.

news.headline: PHINIA Inc. (NYSE: PHIN) to report Q1 2025 earnings on April 25, 2025. Look for updates on PHINIA's website. Webcast planned.

news.headline: Joseph Nigro joins Eos Energy Enterprises Board to drive growth and enhance competitive position in energy sector.
